model.name: predicateValidator
model.title: Predicate Validator
model.description: Uses a predicate expression to validate message data types at the route level
model.label: validation

expression.description: The predicate expression to use for validation.

type.description: The data type name to validate. If you specify 'xml:XYZ', the validator is picked up when message type is 'xml:XYZ'. If you specify just 'xml', the validator matches all xml message types.
